extra.reason: Implemented pj census JSON and live stdlib dashboard server with signature-aware refresh; tests pass.
Implemented search sort modes, project scoping, multi-term matching, regex search, and fixed filesystem search limiting so newer matches are not crowded out by root order.
Added pj --version and bumped the pre-1.0 feature release version to 0.2.0.
Made pj search help teach project scoping, multi-term search, regex, sort modes, and phrase-search pitfalls; added no-result hint for quoted multi-word searches.
Added pj search --here to infer the current project from cwd using longest discovered project path containment; documented and tested success/error behavior.
Changed Codex resume command formatting from codex --resume <id> to codex resume <id>, updated CLI/help docs, and covered with tests.
Implemented census background start/status/stop CLI lifecycle with structured JSON output, local health/control endpoint, process metadata, docs, and tests.
Fixed pj search/session timestamps to use session last activity (ended_at) when available; added regression tests and verified the original search now reports recent activity.
Implemented regex discoverability hints and tests
Bumped pj version to 0.2.1 and verified CLI version command
Implemented pj chats and pj chat list alias with cwd project resolution, docs, and tests.
Bumped package and CLI version to 0.2.2 and verified with tests.

Done: documented and tested CLI-first web API contract; added thin stdlib endpoints for census/search/show/chats/chat/annotations with annotation writes through pj.annotate and shared project session helper. Validation: python3 -m pytest (178 passed).

Done: documented pj ports, pj ports --project, and census include-ports contract with record fields, confidence levels, platform/failure behavior, and web API mapping. Validation: git diff --check -- README.md; python3 -m pytest tests/test_census.py.

Done: implemented pj.runtime_ports facade with lsof/ss/procfs parsers, normalized port records, graceful error envelopes, and pj ports CLI wrapper. Validation: python3 -m pytest tests/test_runtime_ports.py; python3 -m pytest; python3 -m pj ports --project definitely-not-a-project.

Done: added debounced live dashboard search backed by /api/search, separated census table filtering, rendered session snippets and resume commands, and kept pj search semantics in the shared search module. Validation: python3 -m pytest tests/test_census.py; python3 -m pytest; Playwright dashboard search flow.

Done: added a project detail drawer backed by shared pj show-equivalent resolution, with row click loading recent sessions, metadata, notes, tags, priority, and resume command. Validation: python3 -m pytest tests/test_census.py; python3 -m pytest; Playwright dashboard row-click drawer flow.

Done: documented port discovery as an optional local runtime sensor with sensor/actuator boundaries, CLI-first flow, platform caveats, confidence semantics, privacy/security posture, and split-out criteria. Validation: git diff --check -- README.md.

Done: added static web app hints with evidence for package scripts/dependencies, framework configs, Flask/FastAPI markers, and static HTML; surfaced hints through discovery and census rows while keeping live port detection separate. Validation: python3 -m pytest tests/test_web_hints.py tests/test_pj.py::test_discover_with_cass tests/test_pj.py::test_discover_refreshes_cached_web_hints_from_project_files tests/test_census.py::test_normalize_project_maps_detail_fields; python3 -m pytest.

Done: added optional census port enrichment via pj census --include-ports and /api/census?include_ports=1, with rows carrying ports, live_urls, and live_port_count while default census avoids runtime port discovery. Validation: python3 -m pytest tests/test_census.py; python3 -m pytest.

Done: dashboard requests census port enrichment and renders compact server-provided live_urls as new-tab localhost links while empty rows stay clean and link clicks do not open the detail drawer. Validation: python3 -m pytest tests/test_census.py; python3 -m pytest; Playwright live dashboard link rendering/new-tab/no-drawer flow.
Done: added lazy project-detail transcript viewer backed by /api/chat with role, last-N, and hide-tools controls. Validation: tests/test_census.py, full pytest suite, and Playwright transcript flow.
Documented the SKILL.md-first host-backed pj design for sandbox agents in docs/plans/pj-sandbox-agent-access.md and linked it from README.

Done: added project detail annotation actions for note, tag, priority, and confirmed archive using append-only POST endpoints with row/detail refresh. Validation: tests/test_census.py, full pytest suite, diff check, and Playwright annotation flow with isolated PJ_DATA_DIR.

Done: documented web UX maintenance rules for CLI-first layering, endpoint mapping, no parallel UI state, contribution checklist, and Playwright validation criteria. Validation: README diff review and git diff --check.

Done: added /api/next backed by discover/schedule plus a dashboard Next Queue tab with ranked rows and project links. Validation: tests/test_census.py, CLI next/schedule focused tests, full pytest suite, diff check, and Playwright next queue/census switch flow.
Version metadata bumped to 0.3.0 and tests updated.
Added pj ports --pretty, macOS lsof cwd association for live ports, and uncached include_ports refreshes for the dashboard.
Added the suggested independently-grabbable ticket breakdown to docs/plans/pj-sandbox-agent-access.md.
